title: Day 1 Lesson 3 - Video repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:

Sentence 1 - これも ろせんず ですか。(Kore mo rosenzu deska?) = Is this a railway map as well?

Sentence 2 - はい、そうです。(Hai, soo des) = Yes, it is.

Sentence 3 - これも ろせんず ですか。(Kore mo rosenzu deska?) = Is this a railway map as well?

Sentence 4 - いいえ、ろせんず じゃ ありません。(Iie, rosenzu ja arimasen) = No, it's not.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
